note: Shot-by-shot specs for in-engine cutscenes. Letterboxed, skippable after first view. Art via sprite-spec skill; timing in ticks (60/s render, 1s sim ticks paused during scenes).

playerVariantPolicy.rule: Every story image containing the player must support every launch founder. Runtime selection follows the avatar chosen at company creation; founders with the same back-facing workwear silhouette may share a gender scene family while retaining distinct floor sprites and selection portraits.
playerVariantPolicy.identityOverlay: Every active story card renders the exact selected 32-bit founder sprite in a scene badge so hair, skin tone, and individual appearance remain visible even when cinematic backgrounds share a back-facing workwear composition.
invariants: Zach retains his black hat and gray shacket
camera and equipment remain identical between variants

cutscenes.trigger: first time opening the NOX catalog at the planning desk

shots.scene: Detroit skyline at dawn, pixel silhouette (Renaissance Center towers), orange #e8491d sunrise band
Interior: automated plate saw line. Robot gantry picks a 7075 plate; saw sparks (2-frame). Conveyor labels boxes
Terminal POV: NOX-NET quote screen types itself, price stamps in
Black semi with NOX box trailer rolls left-to-right across the player's shop exterior, air brake hiss, dock door opens
shots.text: NEXT-DAY ON YOUR DOCK. CERTS INCLUDED.

shots.scene: Zach at the dock, thumbs up, avatar beside him. Gold quest banner slides in
NOX truck slides into dock lane (screen right edge)
Pallet drops at receiving tile with dust puff; stock counter ticks up; cert tag sparkles if certed

cutscenes.trigger: first time entering the Shop Class corner

shots.scene: Corner of the bay: chalkboard on wheels, two shop stools, pegboard with tools. Zach flips the board from blank to 'SHOP CLASS' in chalk letters
Zach taps the board with a 1/2 endmill like a pointer
shots.text: "Everything on this floor obeys math. Let me show you."
